design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate platforming levels using Bonk's head-based attacks and power-up transformations to reach the goal while collecting bonuses
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Environmental hazards and enemy patterns offset by flexible transformation mechanics that grant temporary offensive/traversal advantages
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Playing as a prehistoric caveman with a powerful headbutt attack, transforming into various creature forms to overcome obstacles and defeat King Drool
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasizes form-shifting and item-driven gameplay over pure platforming skill—power-ups fundamentally change how Bonk interacts with the environment (size changes, flight, shooting capabilities) rather than serving as simple stat boosts

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Power-up availability and transformation access provide variable difficulty scaling; bonus levels offer optional challenge content

progression.upgrade_system: Collectible power-ups that transform Bonk into alternate forms (Bonk Crab with shooting, Big Kronk dinosaur form, size-altering candies, propeller seeds for flight) and temporary stat modifiers (flowers on head)
progression.unlock_mechanism: Progression through themed time-period levels: prehistoric → dinosaur interior → modern Chinatown → moon, with boss encounters gating advancement
replayability_hooks: Multiple bonus levels hidden throughout stages
Collectible flowers and power-ups for alternate playstyles

world_building_techniques: Time-travel level progression establishing location variety (prehistoric → modern → extraterrestrial)
Recurring antagonist King Drool as narrative anchor
Visual theming of each world (dinosaurs, Chinatown architecture, lunar landscape)

boss_design.philosophy: Bosses serve as gatekeepers between thematically distinct worlds; King Drool acts as the narrative and mechanical focal point of progression
notable_bosses: King Drool (arch nemesis, likely appears across multiple forms/encounters)

faction_indicators: King Drool as centralized opposition force
danger_signals: King Drool's magical influence spanning multiple eras
environmental_storytelling: Prehistoric cavern design establishing origin setting
Dinosaur interior spaces suggesting dimensional instability
Anachronistic Chinatown level indicating cross-temporal chaos
Moon level representing escalation of King Drool's power

sources_used: wikipedia: Super Bonk article (gameplay section, development, critical reception)
